before: plumbing and gas line connections for hot tubs
Calls from regular property managers and general contractors are considered emergencies
Emergency calls from other clients are evaluated case‑by‑case by Ben

after.action: Caller will be contacted the next business day

changes.before: Requires integration with Jobber CRM (currently used for scheduling and invoicing).
After‑hours calls are taken directly by Ben; there is no automated voicemail or 24/7 on‑call system.
changes.after: After hours, emergency calls from G&M Pressure Washing are patched through to Ben; all other callers receive a message and will be contacted the next business day.

changes.before: During business hours Clara answers calls, books site visits and jobs via Jobber, but appointment confirmations require Ben's approval.
changes.after: During business hours (Mon‑Fri 8:30 AM‑5:00 PM), Clara answers calls, mentions the $115 service call fee only if asked, and can forward calls to the second number once it is set up or transfer to Ben on request.
